CONTENT.Club career: Sissoko made his professional debut for Clermont in a Ligue 2 2–0 win over Châteauroux on 19 September 2017.On 30 January 2022, Sissoko signed with Quevilly-Rouen until the end of the season.
CONTENT.Personal life: Alpha Sissoko was born in Bondy, France and has French nationality. He is of Malian descent.
CONTENT.External links: Alpha Sissoko at SoccerwayAlpha Sissoko – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Alpha Sissoko at L'Équipe Football (in French)

SUMMARY: Alpha Nelson Sissoko (born 7 March 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right-back for  Championnat National club Quevilly-Rouen.
